api_key.description: NewsData.io API key, sent as the 'apikey' query parameter. Never logged.

base_url.description: NewsData.io API base URL override for tests or proxies.

search_query.description: Optional search keywords, sent as the 'q' query parameter on article streams.

categories.description: Optional comma-separated category filter, sent as the 'category' query parameter.

countries.description: Optional comma-separated country filter, sent as the 'country' query parameter.

languages.description: Optional comma-separated language filter, sent as the 'language' query parameter.

domains.description: Optional comma-separated domain filter, sent as the 'domain' query parameter.

start_date.description: Optional archive lower-bound date (YYYY-MM-DD), sent as 'from_date' on the archive stream.

end_date.description: Optional archive upper-bound date (YYYY-MM-DD), sent as 'to_date' on the archive stream.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-50), sent as the 'size' query parameter on article streams.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
